productDisplayName: Timberland Kids Boys Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: A perfect gift for your little boy who is fast growing up, the timberland Junior 6 Inch Premium Boot combines the best of style and comfort to make your young man feel all the more grown up. With a classic design and cushioned comfort, it's a great way to prepare him for adoloscent fashion.UpperPremium suede leather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleDirect-attach, seam-sealed waterproof constructionHigh ankle for enhanced comfortCushioned collar in synthetic leather for durability, comfort and to keep debris awayPadded moisture-wicking textile inner lining for ultimate breathable comfortLacing system with durable laces made of Taslan fibre and rustproof eyelets for a snug, customised FitEmbossed branding on the lateral ankle for styleMidsoleCushioned fabric footbed for all-day comfort and supportOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with lugs in the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and tractionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleshoe careClean upper using a suede brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
